title: England in trouble after dreadful day against NZ
description: England are in a dire position against New Zealand after spiralling from a chaotic morning on day two of the second Test at The Oval.

title: Scotland fall short of famous win over Windies
description: Scotland come up agonisingly short of a famous victory at the T20 World Cup as West Indies somehow come through to win a tumultuous game at Headingley.

title: Usyk-Verhoeven ref had seen enough to end fight before bell
description: The referee at the centre of the controversial fight between Oleksandr Usyk and Rico Verhoeven tells a boxing commission he had seen enough to stop the bout in the 11th round before the bell sounded.

title: Stokes could return as captain for third Test against NZ
description: Ben Stokes could return as England captain as early as next week for the third Test against New Zealand at Trent Bridge.

title: Tuchel's complaints lead to Fifa moving photographers
description: England head coach Thomas Tuchel has won a battle with Fifa to get photographers moved away from the bench during the national anthems.

title: Sutton's World Cup score predictions - second group games
description: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the scores of the second round of group games at the 2026 World Cup.

title: Olympic medallist Simpson recovering after collapse
description: Olympic medallist Jenny Simpson is making 'encouraging improvement' in hospital after collapsing at an event in Raleigh, North Carolina.

title: McIlroy starts strongly as Shinnecock bares its teeth
description: Shinnecock Hills lives up to it's reputation as one of the toughest tests in golf on the opening day of a fog-delayed US Open as Rory McIlroy cards a one-under 69 in the opening round.
